summary: Comprehensive frontend navigation test for ENLIGHTEN.MINT.CAFE. All 16 core modules load correctly. Landing page shows streamlined hero with 7 Category Pillars (Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore, Sage, Council). Ghost elements (PerspectiveToggle, floating nodules) are successfully purged. STOP button is at opacity 0.08 (nearly invisible) positioned at bottom-right (bottom: 85px, right: 15px). All navigation bars (top and bottom) work correctly.

minor.issue: 401 errors when not logged in - expected behavior for protected routes

critical_code_review_comments: Ghost element purge working correctly via OmnisUniversalCore.js heartbeat (2s interval)
PerspectiveToggle CSS purge rules in index.css working (display: none !important)
STOP button opacity correctly set to 0.08 in EmergencyShutOff.js
Category Pillars navigation links have proper data-testid attributes
All 16 core modules load without blank pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core modules verified to load. Ghost elements purged. STOP button at opacity 0.08. Navigation bars functional.
